titleZh: Over & Over Ltd 诉 Bonvests Holdings Ltd
titleEn: Over & Over Ltd v Bonvests Holdings Ltd and another
holdingZh: Over & Over 是新加坡少数股东压迫诉讼的代表案例，强调压迫判断的核心在于整体公平性，并细化了增资、关联交易和控制股东安排对少数股东的影响审查。
holdingEn: Over & Over is a leading Singapore oppression case, emphasizing overall unfairness as the core inquiry and examining how rights issues, related-party dealings, and controller-backed arrangements affect minority shareholders.
